completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith single-part Dart library (pure-Dart Oracle thin driver), ~16.5k LOC in lib/
Existing docs found: README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE, CLAUDE.md, _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md, _bmad-output/project-context.md
Tech stack: Dart 3.12+, pointycastle, logging, meta; no FFI, no package:crypto, no web
Deep scan of transport, protocol/codec, crypto/auth layers + public API surface via parallel explorers
Architecture doc written (3-layer: transport -> protocol -> API)
Supporting docs written: project-overview, source-tree-analysis, api-reference, development-guide

findings.project_classification: monolith / single-part / library (pure-Dart Oracle thin-mode driver)
findings.technology_stack: Dart SDK ^3.12.0; pointycastle ^4.0.0 (crypto); logging; meta; dev: test, lints
findings.architecture: Three-layer: transport/ (TNS + sockets/TLS) -> protocol/ (TTC messages + codecs + OSON) -> public API (OracleConnection)
